canonical_role: Asset generation, certification, budget governance, and controlled promotion service.

workflow.name: Dispatch One Paid V1 Asset Smoke Call

permissions_before: Workflow-wide actions: write and contents: read; automatic push trigger on workflow-file changes.
permissions_after: Workflow-wide contents: read; actions: write limited to the single manual dispatch job; no push trigger.
license_impact: No license or attribution content changed.
artifact: GitHub step summary records non-secret approval ID, exact target SHA, one-call ceiling, USD 0.10 total ceiling, and promotion disabled.
release_impact: Eliminates automatic paid-provider dispatch on push. Paid execution now requires manual workflow dispatch, exact current main SHA, a non-secret approval ID, typed confirmation, the paid-asset-generation environment, and bounded non-promotion inputs.
rollback: Revert the Workstream E pull request. Do not restore the automatic push trigger or mutable action tag without a documented spending-authority decision.
limitations: The downstream canonical-version-forge.yml still uses mutable action tags and requires a separate focused correction.
Environment reviewer and secret-scope settings are not visible through the available connector actions.
No provider call was triggered by Workstream E.
redactions: No provider secret, API key, billing credential, or private approval content was read or recorded.
exact_next_action: Open the focused pull request, require exact-head checks, then pin all actions in canonical-version-forge.yml on a non-colliding companion branch or active owner handoff.
